title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, August 02 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 02/08/2022
Image reference: 2022-08-02_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-august-02-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker values have softened
Panamax Bonanza YR (76,500 DWT, Aug 2006, Tsuneishi Zosen) sold to Middle Eastern buyers for USD 16.50 mil, VV Value USD 18.36 mil - BWTS Fitted. Supramax Sophia K (55,600 DWT, Aug 2011, Mitsui Tamano) sold to Middle Eastern buyers for USD 22.90 mil, VV Value USD 21.94 mil - BWTS Fitted. Handy BC Maria L (28,400 DWT, Feb 1998, Hakodate Dock) sold to unknown Syrian buyers for USD 7.30 mil, VV Value USD 8.12 mil - SS Due.
